title: Diplocyatha ciliata
taxonomy: Diplocyatha ciliata is classified as a species of soft coral in the phylum Cnidaria. It belongs to the class Anthozoa and the order Scleractinia. Within the family Fungiidae, it is placed in the subfamily Fungiinae. Diplocyatha ciliata is further classified as a genus within the family Fungiidae. Its classification is significant for understanding its characteristics and behavior in the marine ecosystem.
